description_long: This house consists of two connected structures: a larger, three-story brick building and a smaller, two-story house with a steep gable roof. The main building features multiple balconies with white railings, spiral staircases, and a prominent arched window on the second floor. The smaller house section has a dark gray gable roof, red brick walls, and a spiral staircase leading to a lower level. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and includes small landscaped areas with trees and grass. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern, and the entryway is marked by a set of steps and a modest porch.
description: A connected multi-story brick house with balconies, spiral staircases, and a gable-roofed section, featuring regular window patterns and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable-roofed section, brick walls, and a spiral staircase at the rear, with a sidewalk and trees visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three-story main building, multiple balconies, spiral staircases, and the arched window.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the brick facade of the main building, flat roof, and minimal window detail.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, steps, porch, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with an arched feature window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a modest porch, and a simple door flanked by windows and landscaping
